articles.title: Pentagon Advances CJADC2 Network Integration Across Services
articles.excerpt: The Department of Defense is accelerating efforts to connect command and control systems across all military branches under the Combined Joint All-Domain Command and Control initiative, with new interoperability standards expected by mid-2026.

articles.title: DIU Replicator Initiative Expands Autonomous Systems Portfolio
articles.excerpt: The Defense Innovation Unit has added new autonomous platform programs under the Replicator initiative, focusing on low-cost attritable drones and undersea vehicles for distributed operations in contested environments.

articles.title: SBIR Phase II Awards Target AI-Driven Cyber Defense
articles.excerpt: The Air Force Research Laboratory has awarded SBIR Phase II contracts to small businesses developing AI-powered cybersecurity tools, including automated threat hunting and network anomaly detection for tactical networks.

articles.title: Ukraine Conflict Reshapes DoD Procurement Priorities for FY27
articles.excerpt: Lessons from the Ukraine conflict are driving major shifts in FY27 defense procurement, with increased emphasis on counter-UAS capabilities, electronic warfare systems, and rapid acquisition pathways for commercial technology.
